global_description: A small, slender songbird with a rounded body and short tail. It features a streaked brown and gray plumage with a buffy breast and a distinctive white eye-ring. The wings and back are brown with darker streaks, and the underparts are pale with fine streaks.

part_details.head: Rounded with a white eye-ring and streaked crown

spatial_relations: The white eye-ring encircles the eye
The streaked crown is on top of the head
The wings are attached to the sides of the body
The tail extends from the rear of the body
